title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach gives agents a broader web-search surface
friendlyTitle: Panniantong/Agent-Reach gives agents a broader web-search surface
summary: Agent-Reach is a CLI that lets AI agents read and search sources such as X, YouTube, GitHub, and other platforms without separate API fees.
friendlySummary: Agent-Reach is a CLI that lets AI agents read and search sources such as X, YouTube, GitHub, and other platforms without separate API fees.
whyItMatters: It can help developers prototype research and monitoring agents that need fresh cross-platform context. Treat it as infrastructure for collection, then add verification and source-quality filters before relying on outputs.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help developers prototype research and monitoring agents that need fresh cross-platform context. Treat it as infrastructure for collection, then add verification and source-quality filters before relying on outputs.
